message:
fix: Implement real socket, urllib, ftplib operations and clarify AOT limitations

- socket.zig: Add Windows gethostname() using GetComputerNameExA with fallback
- urllib.zig: Implement real HTTP fetching using std.http.Client for urlopen/urlretrieve
- ftplib.zig: Implement real socket connect, send, and recv for FTP protocol
- concurrent.zig: Implement Executor.submitWork() delegating to ThreadPoolExecutor
- copyreg.zig: Implement _reconstructor returning ReconstructedObject metadata
- modsupport.zig: Implement moduleCreate() returning ModuleObject
- ast.zig: Replace NotImplemented with descriptive AOT limitation errors
- dis.zig: Replace NotImplemented with NoBytecodeInAOT for bytecode functions
